title: Tempting Thick Filipino Cream Pudding
description: A savory and cozy Filipino dessert featuring whipping cream and a soffritto-base, this pudding is FODMAP-friendly and has a glassy-jelly texture.
instructions: In a small bowl, sprinkle the gelatin over 1/4 cup of cold water and let it soften for 5 minutes.
In a medium saucepan, combine the milk, sugar, and soffritto, and heat over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the sugar has dissolved and the mixture is hot but not boiling.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and add the softened gelatin, stirring until it is fully dissolved.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
In a large bowl, whip the chilled whipping cream until it forms stiff peaks.
Add the vanilla extract to the whipped cream and whip until combined.
Fold the cooled milk mixture into the whipped cream until well combined.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups and refrigerate until set, at least 4 hours or overnight.
